title: Club nights with friendly support
intro: Fenland Running Club generally meets on Tuesday and Thursday evenings at Wisbech Rugby Club. Sessions are supported by qualified coaches and run leaders.
todo: Confirm current meeting times, exact meeting point, session descriptions and safety briefing before launch.
whatToExpectIntro: Bring suitable running kit, weather-appropriate layers and any medication you normally carry. New runners should make themselves known to a coach or run leader at the start of the session.
